title: Silhouette Studio
excerpt: If you've ever wanted to play designer, here's your chance. Silhouette has a fantastic special on the Silhouette packages. You may remember this project I did with the sketch pens. I just love the hand drawn look achieved with the…
body:
If you've ever wanted to play designer, here's your chance. Silhouette has a fantastic special on the Silhouette packages. You may remember this project I did with the sketch pens.

I just love the hand drawn look achieved with the designs. With the Designer Edition software, you can not only utilize the many designs from the shop, but you can make your very own designs. These can then be sketched with the pens or cut using the blade. You could even turn your own designs into acrylic stamps. Thinking about turning these designs from my Cut & Paste collection into stamps soon...

Silhouette Studio® Designer Edition contains all the same functionality as Silhouette Studio® plus enhanced designer features including:

  • Ability to open, manipulate, and cut SVG files

  • Rhinestone tools to convert designs into rhinestone templates and create your own rhinestone designs

  • Sketch tools to convert designs into several styles of sketchable art

  • Creative knife tools to allow you to clip designs using different patterns

  • Enhanced eraser set to modify designs with more precision

  • Built-in ruler and guide lines for precise alignment and drawing
